message:
feat(Python): Implement 4 profiling/statistics CPython modules in Zig

- pyfpe.zig: Floating-point exception handling, IEEE 754 detection, safe math ops
- pystats.zig: Python statistics collection (opcode/alloc/call/specialization/GC stats)
- legacy_tracing.zig: Legacy tracing API (sys.settrace/setprofile), TraceEvent enum
- instrumentation.zig: PEP 669 monitoring API, MonitoringEvent, ToolId, callbacks

Combined ~1880 lines of idiomatic Zig code replacing CPython C implementations.
